prompt: Run the test suite to identify the RecursionError in graphlib.py caused by incorrect visited set handling. Fix the DFS helper function signature and logic to correctly track visited nodes and prevent infinite loops on cycles, then re-run tests to confirm they pass.

provenance.summary: Fix infinite recursion in tree traversal implementation
provenance.task_nl: Debug the failing recursive depth-first search implementation in graphlib.py where the visited set is not passed correctly causing infinite loops on cycles, and fix the helper function signature to include the visited state.
provenance.env_nl: A Python repository with a graphlib.py implementing DFS on a directed graph and test_graph.py testing reachability between nodes, currently failing with RecursionError or timeout due to unhandled cycles.
